title: Dragon Survival: Alternate Altar Recipes
description: An Addon for Dragon Survival. This mod adds a new crafting recipes for Dragon Altars in the Dragon Survival Mod
body:
# Overview

This mod is a quick and dirty addon for [Dragon Survival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragons-survival) made using MCreator for a private mod-pack of mine, and I decided to share it here. I probably won't maintain this beyond what is needed for my mod-pack, but I am open to suggestions that end up intriguing me(there currently isn't a way to contact me sorry).

The intent is to ~~disable crafting altars, and starting as a dragon in the Dragon Survival server.toml, and then reintroduce altar recipes using this mod.~~ overwrite the base Dragon Survival recipes. The recipes are designed to be fairly late-game (at least by vanilla standards) as in my mod pack, becoming a dragon is meant to be a goal to work towards.

I suggest disabling the choice to start as a Dragon in the base Dragon Survival server side config file, but it's your game, do what you want.


# Recipes

All recipes contain a Nether Star, 2 Source Gems from [Ars Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau), 1 of each type of Dragon Heart from [Ice and Fire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-dragons), 1 Elder Dragon Heart from [Dragon Survival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragons-survival), and 2 of the appropriate blocks for the type of Altar you are trying to craft.

# Requirements
This mod is dependent on items from:
- [Ice and Fire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-dragons) 
- [Ars Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau)
- [Dragon Survival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragons-survival)
